name: minifyjs
description: Minify JavaScript files using the terser minification library. Minify the active file with a command or automatically on save, with optional source map generation.

markdownEnumDescriptions: Do not minify file on save
Minify previously minified files (files with an existing .min.js file) on save
minifyjs.minifyOnSave.description: Whether or not to automatically minify JavaScript files on save

minifyjs.generateSourceMap.description: Whether or not to generate a source map for the minified JavaScript file

minifyjs.successNotificationStatusBar.description: Whether or not to show a notification in the status bar on successful minification

minifyjs.successNotificationInformationM.description: Whether or not to show an information message on successful minification
